positive: A stylized, bold abstract illustration of a soaring golden phoenix rising from geometric plumes and swirling nebula smoke. The design features clean, sharp silhouettes and high contrast black, deep crimson, gold, and electric blue accents. Composition is symmetrical and centered, ideal for a t-shirt print. The style is a mix of Art Deco geometry and modern neo-tribal linework, giving it a vibrant, celestial energy. Dramatic backlighting and spot color effects enhance the dimensionality. Perfect for screen printing on fabric.
